ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., round-robin, knockout) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "prize_pool" TEXT /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "entry_fee" TEXT /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "current_participants" INTEGER /* Current number of participants */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the player (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "tournament_history" TEXT /* Tournament history of the player (e.g., previous tournaments played) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Player's gender */,
  "country" TEXT /* Player's country */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Player's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Player's email address */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game belongs to */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number in the tournament */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game is played */,
  "score_p1" INTEGER /* Score of player 1 */,
  "score_p2" INTEGER /* Score of player 2 */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee overseeing the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "total_points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned across all tournaments */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved in a single game */,
  "lowest_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score achieved in a single game */,
  "average_score" TEXT /* Average score across all games */,
  "win_percentage" TEXT /* Win percentage across all games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., tournament administrator, player, spectator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* User's contact number */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the schedule belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number in the tournament */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game is played */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament was played */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position of the player in the tournament */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player in the tournament */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the player in the tournament */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the player in the tournament */,
  "games_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of games drawn by the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_history_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
